title: Enemies
writer: Emil Burri, Arthur Luethy, Viktor Tourjansky
actors: Brigitte Horney, Willy Birgel, Reinhold Lütjohann
plot: WWII-era Nazi propaganda film about a German foreign laborer called Keith who in 1939 works in a Polish sawmill near the border with Nazi Germany. When local anti-German sentiment leads to lynchings, lovely Anna hides Keith in her...
